Event: Magic Well - May 2025
Event Date: 07/05/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: RI177


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Ranger Chest
Red Feather Ring

When any unit is resurrected, one of the following effects is triggered:
If an ally is resurrected, the damage, crit, physical and magic armor piercing of the ring owner and the resurrected unit will be increased by 55% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 times.
If an enemy is resurrected, the ring owner will increase the enemy's incoming damage by 45% for 4 sec, and will increase their own health, physical and magic armor by 40% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 times.

Requirements: 98-100
